title: Multiples Formularios;Columna de Menu Desplegable, poder agregar datos y que los mismos aparezcan en todos los formularios pero como oculto
excerpt:
It’s great to be able to have more than one form in a single dashboard and configure titles and columns based on the information you want to display. 
But it would be even better if this information, added to a Dropdown …

posts.author: Ga09 (Gabriela Maldonado)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s great to be able to have more than one form in a single dashboard and configure titles and columns based on the information you want to display.
But it would be even better if this information, added to a Dropdown and Status column as a new label, was hidden by default. Currently, it’s visible every time a new label is added.
Thank you very much.

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Ga09

Bill here from monday.com

Thank you for your feedback and suggestion.

I’ve moved your post to the features request section of the community.

If you can share some screenshots to further elaborate what you would like this feature to look like that would be very helpful.

Cheers,
Bill
